column1: Lazy half smile with heavy lidded gaze
Playful smirk like she knows the secret
Cold stare unbothered and slightly amused
Wide eyed surprise with glossy lips parted
Flirty side glance lashes down then up
Defiant chin lift eyes locked on camera
Mischievous grin with cheeky eyebrow raise
Bored pout like the party is beneath her
Laughing mid breath carefree and unapologetic
Sultry stare with slow blink confidence
Tough girl glare mouth set and steady
Coy smile looking away then back
Lip bite teasing without trying too hard
Open mouth laugh wild energy and chaos
Soft dreamy gaze like synthpop daydream
Suspicious squint like she heard a rumor
Intense focus eyes sharp and hungry
Sweet smile with a dangerous undertone
Deadpan expression ironic and fearless
Bold grin teeth showing pure main character energy
